name: LinearB Engineering Intelligence API
what_it_does: Engineering intelligence platform with REST API — enabling engineering leaders to track DORA metrics (deployment frequency, lead time, change failure rate, MTTR), cycle time analytics from Git activity, team performance benchmarking, and work breakdown analysis, with automated GitOps-based team goals via WorkerB Slack bot integration.
use_cases: Tracking DORA metrics via LinearB API for engineering efficiency measurement and reporting
Analyzing team cycle time via LinearB API for delivery performance dashboards
Benchmarking engineering teams via LinearB API against industry standards
Measuring work breakdown via LinearB API (new features vs bugs vs debt) for planning
Automating engineering KPI reporting via LinearB API for quarterly business reviews
not_for: Individual developer productivity tracking for performance reviews (ethical concerns with surveillance)
Real-time code review or task management (use GitHub/Jira for task management)
Engineering metrics without GitHub, GitLab, Jira, or Bitbucket (requires integrations)
best_when: An engineering VP or director needs objective DORA metrics and cycle time data to understand delivery performance, identify bottlenecks, and set team goals backed by data.
avoid_when: You lack GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket integration, want individual developer surveillance, or need real-time task management.

auth.notes: API key via LinearB-Auth header. API key from account settings. No OAuth2. REST API at public-api.linearb.io/api/v1/. WorkerB Slack bot for team goal notifications. GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket integration required for data. Jira/Linear integration for issue tracking correlation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: limited metrics; trial available
pricing.notes: Israeli company (Tel Aviv). Founded 2018 by Ori Keren and Dan Lines (ex-CheckPoint, ex-Amdocs). $25M+ funding (Battery Ventures). DORA metrics focus since State of DevOps report popularization. WorkerB: Slack bot for automated team goal setting and tracking. Cycle time breakdown: coding → review → merge → deploy stages. Industry benchmarks: Elite/High/Medium/Low DORA performers. Used by: Brex, Orca Security, Druva. Lean engineering analytics vs individual tracking. Controversy: some engineering analytics tools face criticism for developer surveillance — LinearB emphasizes team-level metrics.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: LinearB-Auth header. Israeli company. GitHub/GitLab required. No webhooks. WorkerB Slack bot. DORA metrics focus. $18-30/user/month. SOC2/GDPR.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Metric reads are idempotent — same query returns same historical data. Team reads idempotent by team ID. No write operations in standard API (read-only analytics).
known_agent_gotchas: Read-only API — data ingested from GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket integrations (configure in UI first)
Requires GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket integration set up before API data is available
Team-level metrics only (not individual developer metrics) — team-based data model
Israeli company — GDPR compliance for EU use; US/EU data residency
WorkerB Slack bot requires separate Slack app installation for team goal notifications

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Custom LinearB-Auth header. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant (Israeli company). Engineering performance data (cycle time, deployment frequency) is sensitive leadership data. US/EU data residency. Read-only analytics API reduces write-operation risk. Non-standard auth header — log sanitization required. GitHub/GitLab integration credentials must be secured.
